# StrideShip
> StrideShip is a Mumbai-based AI automation agency that builds custom operational systems for the global logistics industry. We automate the manual documentation and workflow infrastructure of customs clearance, freight forwarding, and trade compliance — replacing hours of manual data entry with intelligent, end-to-end automation systems.

## What We Do
- Custom automation of customs documentation (Bill of Entry processing, commercial invoice parsing, packing list extraction)
- AI-powered BOE (Bill of Entry) preparation from commercial invoice PDFs into Google Sheets and ERP-ready formats
- RFQ and quote automation for freight forwarders
- Shipment tracking and operational dashboard systems
- DGFT intelligence and duty credit scrip portfolio tracking (RoDTEP, MEIS, DFIA)
- Automated client communication workflows (WhatsApp, email)
- Custom integrations with Indian ERP systems (Softlink, SAP, etc.)

## Who We Serve
- Customs House Agents (CHAs) in India
- Freight forwarders and NVOCCs
- LCL consolidators and 3PL providers
- Importers and exporters (EXIM businesses)
- Clearance agents at major Indian ports (Nhava Sheva / JNPT, Mundra, Chennai)

## Technology Stack
- n8n workflow automation (self-hosted)
- Google Gemini Vision API for document extraction
- PostgreSQL for data management
- Docker and Ubuntu Server infrastructure
- Cloudflare Tunnels for secure connectivity
- Google Sheets and ERP API integrations

## Founders
- Gaarth Godbole — Co-Founder and CEO. Mumbai-based. Specializes in logistics operations strategy and EXIM domain expertise.
- Siddhant Vaidya — Co-Founder and CTO. Leads all technical architecture and automation infrastructure.

## Key Concepts
- The Manual Entry Trap: The problem where elite logistics professionals are forced to act as data entry clerks, preventing firm growth
- Review-Only Workflow: StrideShip's target state where operators review auto-extracted data rather than manually typing it
- Logic Layer: StrideShip's proprietary extraction and normalization engine
- Ephemeral Processing: StrideShip does not retain client trade data after processing is complete
